content:
Associate Advocate and Legal Internship Opportunity – July 2026 | Harshit Chopra & Associates (HCA) 

Applications are invited for for Associate Advocate and Legal Internship Opportunity – July 2026 :

1. Associate Advocate (Fresher)
Full-time role for fresher’s and recent law graduates.
Practice Areas: Civil, Criminal, Consumer, Labour, and Commercial Litigation
Location: I.P. Extension, Delhi – 110092
Salary: As per industry standards

2. Internship – July 2026
Law students looking to gain hands-on litigation experience are welcome to apply for our internship program for July 2026.

Shortlisted candidates for interview will be contacted via email/WhatsApp.

To Apply: Kindly fill out the form here → https://lnkd.in/gvfBZUFW
For queries: officeofhca@gmail.com/011-46564555


Chambers of Harshit Chopra
Harshit Chopra and Associates ( HCA )

Know someone who might be a good fit? Tag them or share this post!

#LegalJobs #Litigation #AssociateAdvocate #InternshipOpportunity #DelhiJobs #LawCareers #HCA #NowHiring #LawStudents
comment: For freshers in litigation, the key differentiator is often actual court exposure and drafting ownership in first 3–6 months, not just role title or CTC.
